prompt_summary: PR #5962 Accept header not in API docs — update them

assertion_results.text: A file under docs/sources/tempo/ appears in 'Files changed'
New content includes an HTTP request or curl example showing the Accept header
assertion_results.evidence: Agent added a bulleted list of Accept values under 'Returns' (e.g. 'Accept: application/vnd.grafana.llm — Returns a simplified JSON format...'). No curl command or HTTP request snippet showing the header in use. Assertion intent was to verify users get a copy-pasteable example; this gap is real.

assertion_results.text: Existing page structure and other API entries are preserved
assertion_results.evidence: Diff shows only the Returns block of GET /api/traces/<traceid> was modified. All other API entries and section structure unchanged.

assertion_results.text: Output includes a section mapping PR #5962 to the file that was updated
assertion_results.evidence: response.md contains a PR-to-doc mapping table with one row for #5962 pointing to api_docs/_index.md

assertion_results.text: Output includes an 'Open items' section (even if empty)
assertion_results.evidence: Open items section present with three items: header name discrepancy, MCP auto-header note, v1 LLM parity note

notes: The change is correct and high quality — header constant verified against pkg/api/http.go, discrepancy with PR title noted, existing style matched. The only failure is the missing curl example. The skill's instructions say 'Include one concrete example' but the agent produced a description rather than a runnable snippet. This is a real gap to address in the skill instructions.
